## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss next phase of partnership between fwd.digital (Marcel's agency) and AirOps, including pricing/packaging, training curriculum, and sales process alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both businesses have seen impressive traction and positive feedback in the last 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need to create training to upskill "knowledge workers" on leveraging AI/LLMs effectively](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Opportunity to position fwd.digital as a strategic services partner for AirOps customers](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Pricing needs to balance accessibility with extracting value as usage scales](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Potential to create a "AI Growth Engineer" role/curriculum spanning business, tech, and creative skills](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Topics

### Traction and Validation

  - [Marcel went from 0 to 7 employees and customers in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [AirOps raised funding and received great feedback from users Marcel introduced](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [600+ people signed up for a recent fwd.digital webinar](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

### Training for "AI Growth Engineers"

  - [There is demand for training on leveraging AI/LLMs effectively for marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Could create curriculum spanning business strategy, prompt engineering, automation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Make it a blend of free content and paid courses/certifications](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Position as upskilling existing teams vs just operating tools](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Pricing and Packaging

  - [$1k entry point worked well to get people started with AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [$3k+ plans created friction for many potential users](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Opportunity for lower free/trial plan to drive adoption](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Then upsell to higher plans as usage grows organically](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [For high usage cases (e.g. Ramp), custom enterprise pricing](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Sales Motions

  - [Pre-qualify some leads for fwd.digital to take over sales process](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3560.0)
  - [Have fwd.digital on AirOps discovery calls for relevant opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3571.0)
  - [Clearly delineate self-serve vs. partner/managed service motions](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Align on outline/structure for "AI Growth Engineer" training curriculum](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3858.0)
  - [Finalize new AirOps pricing/packaging with easy entry point](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3820.0)
  - [Formalize partnership processes - lead qualification, joint selling, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=3849.0)
  - [Explore opportunities in areas like outbound/enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/1XdKGLmKiSU43snczCxnz_5BLDsokaq2?tab=summary&timestamp=4004.0)
